svg.title: Detailed maritime detection pipeline from raw image to final results
svg.desc: Detailed flowchart of the shared processing pipeline: image acquisition, tiling into small patches, four candidate signal-cleaning methods, model detection, pixel-to-coordinate conversion, ground truth comparison, scoring, and final dashboard output.
svg.text: Four candidate cleaning methods, compared side by side
Every step above has been individually tested and works on its own.
The ground truth comparison step has never run start-to-finish on a
real scene yet — that single end-to-end run is the last missing piece
before a final precision score can be produced.
